allow.reason: False positive: this literal (DEFAULT_DEV_SECRET) is the guarded dev-only fallback passed INTO Nene2\Auth\GuardedJwtSecretResolver::fromConfig(), which fails closed unless NENE2_ALLOW_DEV_SECRET=1. This is the sanctioned fleet fail-close pattern (2026-07-05 JWT migration), not an unguarded default secret. The D1 rule matches the literal shape only and does not inspect GuardedJwtSecretResolver usage. Tracked upstream for a guarded-usage exemption.

ignore.message: Raw current-time read date() with no explicit timestamp. Inject Nene2\Http\ClockInterface (Nene2\Http\UtcClock in production) instead of reading the wall clock directly.
